title: Phase 009 — Retrieval Rerank Clients (Shared RerankClient + EmbeddingCacheClient Interfaces)
description: Phase 009 — ADAPT pt-03 RQ-B5 client extraction. Extract shared RerankClient<T> from memory's cross-encoder.ts so memory backend + coco-index share provider/cache/circuit-breaker semantics. Define EmbeddingCacheClient interface (memory adapter only — Coco adapter DEFERRED until cross-backend hit-rate overlap telemetry justifies). SKIP shared indexing pipelines (binding boundary). 4 sub-phases; ~250-420 prod LOC + ~120-220 tests. Memory consumer behavior unchanged after extraction; CocoIndex consumer opt-in via SPECKIT_COCO_USE_SHARED_RERANK flag.
